## 🎯 **Who I Am**

I'm a **full-stack e-commerce and operations professional** with **6+ years of experience** building, scaling, and managing online businesses from zero to 4,000+ products. I combine technical expertise (Computer Science degree) with hands-on execution across every digital channel.

### 💼 **What I Do**
- ✅ **Build & Scale Shopify Stores** — From setup to 4K+ products
- ✅ **Manage Full E-Commerce Operations** — Sourcing, photography, listings, pricing, customer service
- ✅ **Digital Marketing & Paid Ads** — Google Ads, Meta Ads, SEO, Email Marketing
- ✅ **AI Automation & Workflows** — Invoicing, stock control, email sequences
- ✅ **Supply Chain & Logistics** — Procurement, inventory, warehouse operations
- ✅ **Financial Management** — Invoicing, cash flow tracking, accounting
